title: Synduality Noir Part 2
synopsis: The second cour of SYNDUALITY Noir . Despite returning victorious from a dangerous struggle, Kanata and his friends have, in a sense, lost a key ally, the amnesiac magus Noir. Having partially recovered her memory, Noir reverted back to her former personality: that of Mystere, who acts in a patronizing manner toward her master Kanata. However, Mystere remembers detecting a signal from Histoire, a mystical city, during her former life as an artificially intelligent magus. Meanwhile, Tokio disappears from Rock Town while hunting down the ghosts of his past; however, shocking revelations await the deeper his search goes. As Kanata, his childhood friend Ellie, and the magus diva Ciel set out for Histoire, a hostile organization named Ideal sends assassins after them. If Kanata wants to stand a chance at accomplishing his dream, he must uncover the unpleasant truth about Ideal—and some of his closest allies. (Source: MAL Rewrite)

title: Shitasaki kara Koi
synonyms: Love from the Tip of the Tongue
synopsis: The story revolves around the "cakeverse," in which people are categorized as "forks" and "cakes." Tatsunari is a "fork," who has lost his taste for people, except for "cakes." Naruya is a "cake," who is specifically scrumptious for "forks." (Source: Anime News Network)

title: Pao Fu Xiaojie
synopsis: Each episode of "Pao Fu Xiaojie" consists of an independent short story about the titular character who lives on her own in a big city. The episodes often deal with the themes of love and loneliness.

title: Psyche
synopsis: The main character of this story is a strange creature who lives in shadows. One day, he is left behind by the owner of the shadow he lives in. This creature who has lost his home wanders through the night city in search of his shadow. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Shika to Kanta
synopsis: One day, Kanta, a lonely boy, rescues an orphaned baby sika deer and names it Poyu. There is something special about Poyu, his golden tail. When hunters go after Poyu, Kanta is determined to protect his golden-tailed friend and the other deer. (Source: myanimelist ) Adapted from a children's novel with the same name, written by Daisaku Ikeda and illustrated by Sho Murakami. It tells the sad history of overhunting of sika deer by humans, as well as the friendship between sika deer and children.

title: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
titleRomaji: Sora Tobu Hae mo Hoshi no You
titleEnglish: Out of Sight, Out of Mind
titleNative: 空とぶハエも星のよう
synopsis: SOS… SOS… A black and white TV falls in love with the girl sending out the distress signal. He rushes up the mountain of trash and off to the moon he goes where the crying girl awaits. If only she could see him beyond the screen. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: What’s that smell?
synopsis: The world is filled with smells — good smells, nasty smells, nasty but good smells, addictive smells, captivating smells, reminiscent smells, and so many more. What’s that smell? (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: See My World
synopsis: Two brothers are drawing pictures in art class, but they see completely different things. The younger one is confused by the behavior of his brother, who is lost in his own world. But then, his big brother shares his beautiful world of gentle sea creatures. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Destiny
synopsis: Yui has become estranged from her boyfriend, who doesn’t even wish her happy birthday. Her friend Aya introduces a fortune teller said to be the real deal. What does destiny hold for them? This is a romantic comedy made during self-quarantine. (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: Wonderful Precure! The Movie! Dokidoki♡Game no Sekai de Daibouken!
titleRomaji: Wonderful Precure! The Movie! Dokidoki♡Game no Sekai de Daibouken!
titleNative: わんだふるぷりきゅあ！ざ・むーびー！ドキドキ♡ゲームの世界で大冒険！
synopsis: Komugi, Iroha, Yuki, Mayu, Daifuku and Satoru all got together to play the super popular game "Dokidoki♡TanuKingdom!" But, as everyone was about to start enjoying the game, a suspicious tanuki somehow dragged them into the world of the game... Then there's an even bigger problem! Komugi gets separated from Iroha and all the others...?! "I aaalways want to stay by Iroha's side-wan!" In order to reunite with her beloved Iroha, Komugi takes on all kinds of games and challenges! Why in the world did it end up like this...? Just what kind of secret is the game world hiding...? The clues are held by the girl who made the game, Natsuki. Hirogaru Sky! Precure and Mahoutsukai Precure! also makes an appearance! When everyone's feelings become one, a miracle happens?! (Source: Official website, translated)

title: Empty Hands
titleNative: おうさま・ひめ・ぶた・こじき
synopsis: This movie depicts parallel life stories that occur in Japanese modern society. The fate is determined by a person’s name in a hand-playing song, but the reality is unknown. Are they playing into the hands of someone or living invariably? (Source: Geidai Animation)

title: DICE
synopsis: Whether it's appearance, grades, or social life, Dongtae's at the bottom of the barrel. When popular transfer student Taebin gives him an opportunity to change all of that, Dongtae heads down a path to make things right. This is the world of DICE, where a single roll can change your fate. (Source: WEBTOON)
